description_long: This pair of earrings features a striking geometric design, with a combination of spherical and polygonal elements. The upper section consists of a metallic hook attached to a small rectangular connector, followed by a thin circular ring and a dark, glossy spherical bead. Below the bead, a metallic coil detail adds visual interest before transitioning to a faceted, open polygonal loop that forms the lower part of the earring. The polygonal loop is rendered in a lighter, metallic or ceramic material, contrasting with the darker bead above. The overall construction is delicate yet modern, with a focus on clean lines and geometric forms.
description: A pair of modern geometric earrings with dark spherical beads and faceted polygonal loops, combining metallic and glossy finishes.
description_view_0: Front view showing both earrings with clear visibility of the spherical beads and polygonal loops.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth and three-dimensional structure of the beads and loops.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, with the polygonal loops facing outward and the hooks visible at the top.
description_view_3: Opposite side view emphasizing the alignment of the beads and the open structure of the polygonal loops.
